title: TA18 8NT, Pattemore’s Transport (Crewkerne) Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/NP3127SX/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Pattemore’s Transport (Crewkerne) Limited Installation name: Pattemores Dairy Permit number: EPR/NP3127SX/A001  "
